Meta.title: Holive — Purity, loyalty, and code
Meta.description: Full-stack marketing, digitalization, and courses. We transform businesses with sacred precision and living systems.

Hero.headline: Living code. Sacred brand.
Hero.sub: Marketing, systems, and courses for businesses that choose purity, loyalty, and real transformation.

Manifesto.title: Purity. Loyalty. Transformation.
Manifesto.body: Holive joins the sacred fidelity of brand with the precision of code. We help SMBs and ambitious teams move from traditional to digital — without losing soul, with systems that live.

purity.title: Purity
purity.text: Clear message, clean design, promises kept.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.text: Long-term relationships. Your growth is ours.

code.title: Code
code.text: Automations, sites, and data that hold the vision.

Services.title: Stories you see, touch, and measure
Services.intro: Not a card grid — a layered journey from strategy to print, from feed to storefront.

strategy.title: Integrated strategy
strategy.text: Physical + digital aligned. One voice, many channels.

design.title: Graphic design
design.text: Identity, assets, and visual systems with character.

print.title: Editorial & print
print.text: Banners, flyers, magazines, books — tangible brand.

Digital.title: Systems that work while you grow
Digital.intro: Webs, SaaS, tracking, integrations, and solution manufacturing — with high-touch advisory when it matters.

webs.title: Webs & products
webs.text: Experiences that convert, not just look good.

systems.title: Systems & SaaS
systems.text: Custom tools to operate with clarity.

automation.title: Automations
automation.text: Flows that remove friction and free time.

maquila.title: Solution manufacturing
maquila.text: We build and integrate what your business needs.

Courses.title: Learn the method. Scale with Holive.
Courses.body: Practical training in marketing, digitalization, and systems — built to apply, not just consume. Waitlist open.

listen.title: Listen
listen.text: Honest diagnosis: business, brand, real friction.

Contact.title: Tell us your next move
Contact.body: One message is enough. We reply with clarity — no noise.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Received. We'll be in touch soon.
Contact.error: Something failed. Try again or email us directly.
Contact.missing: Demo mode: configure Supabase to capture leads.

Footer.gameHint: Made it this far? Holi is waiting below.
Footer.experimentsHint: Secret files from the Holive lab.

Experiments.metaDescription: Secret archive of failed Holive lab experiments: the eye, the olive, rhythm, and business mysticism.
Experiments.title: Experiments that should have stayed sealed… and here they are.
Experiments.intro: These are not generic demos. They are Holive lab dossiers: rare, failed, beautifully imperfect attempts where the eye, Holi, and entrepreneurial energy meet. Read them as secret files — with corporate humor and a moral.
Experiments.openingRefran: Who plants clarity harvests loyalty. / Quien siembra claridad, cosecha lealtad.
Experiments.closingRefran: The eye that watches with purpose does not blink at noise. / El ojo que mira con propósito no se cierra ante el ruido.
Experiments.closingBody: If something in this lab speaks to you, it is not magic: it is method. Let’s write the next experiment… inside your business.

eye.title: The eye that never blinks in meetings
eye.summary: We tried to teach a digital iris to track client attention. Result: it watched us instead. Holi approved with a wink. The lab filed the failure… and turned it into ritual.
eye.refran: An attentive eye beats a thousand blind metrics. / El ojo atento vale más que mil métricas ciegas.
eye.hint: Move the cursor — the iris follows

spiral.title: Corporate mantra waterfall
spiral.summary: We wanted promises to fall like rain. Too much poetry, not enough KPI… until someone read them aloud. Now it reminds us: message is won by conscious repetition, not volume.
spiral.refran: What repeats with soul becomes culture. / Lo que se repite con alma, se convierte en cultura.

seed.title: Genesis of the sacred olive
seed.summary: One button. One olive. Too many meetings about growth. This file proves growth is not a dashboard: it is patience with direction.
seed.refran: Do not force the harvest; water the system. / No fuerces la cosecha; riega el sistema.

mesh.title: Loyalty mesh (living network)
mesh.summary: We connected nodes as if they were teams. When one moves, the rest answers. Failed as a product; shone as a metaphor: loyalty is a network, not a contract.
mesh.refran: Loyalty is woven; it is not bought wholesale. / La lealtad se teje; no se compra al mayoreo.
mesh.hint: Drag a node — the net responds

prism.title: Brand prism storm
prism.summary: We threw purple and gold light through a prism. The lab lit up… and also got confused. Lesson: a strong brand refracts; a weak one dissolves.
prism.refran: A clear brand refracts; a confused one vanishes. / La marca clara refracta; la confusa se pierde.

orbit.title: Sacred orbits around Holi
orbit.summary: We tried to orbit KPIs around Holi. Holi refused to be a satellite. Now he is the center and metrics revolve with respect. As it should be.
orbit.refran: Put soul at the center and the system will orbit. / Pon el alma en el centro y el sistema orbitará.

nova.title: Clarity nova (tap to expand)
nova.summary: Each tap expands a ring of clarity. Too many taps and the lab looks like a party. Exactly: clarity is also energy — dosed.
nova.refran: Clarity expanded with purpose is not noise. / Claridad expandida con propósito no es ruido.

cyclone.title: Holive lexicon cyclone
cyclone.summary: Craft words spinning around the name. We wanted a word cloud and got a cyclone. Perfect: brand language should orbit, not float.
cyclone.refran: The right words find their center. / Las palabras correctas encuentran su centro.

signal.title: Radar of the craft
signal.summary: A spectrum that pulses with scroll. We wanted to detect signal vs noise in the market. We found something better: the visitor’s rhythm.
signal.refran: Hear the rhythm before you raise the volume. / Escucha el ritmo antes de subir el volumen.

mirror.title: Mirror ledger
mirror.summary: Above: what you promise. Below: what you return. The mirror does not lie; the lab tried to sweeten it. Failed. Good.
mirror.refran: What you sow in voice, you reap in deeds. / Lo que siembras en voz, lo cosechas en hechos.

liquid.title: Liquid brief (ink that listens)
liquid.summary: A brief that behaves like living ink. It follows the cursor because the brief should follow the client — not the creative ego.
liquid.refran: A living brief follows the problem, not the trend. / El brief vivo sigue al problema, no a la moda.
liquid.hint: Move the cursor — the ink answers

heartbeat.title: KPI with an olive pulse
heartbeat.summary: We turned a metric into a heartbeat. Because a business without rhythm is an org chart without soul. Tune the BPM: find your craft tempo.
heartbeat.refran: Without rhythm there is no sustainable harvest. / Sin ritmo no hay cosecha sostenible.
heartbeat.hint: Tune the pulse of your system

glitch.title: Glitch dossier (wounded files)
glitch.summary: Files damaged by haste. Hover and they heal. Cheap metaphor… and true: attention repairs what haste breaks.
glitch.refran: Haste corrupts; attention restores. / La prisa corrompe; la atención restaura.
glitch.line2: Holive plants systems that respect the soul of the craft.

vortex.title: Golden vortex of intention
vortex.summary: A harvest spiral. We tried to visualize client attraction and got a vortex of intention. Better: attraction without purpose is just golden noise.
vortex.refran: Focused intention attracts; scattered intention spins empty. / La intención enfocada atrae; la dispersa gira vacía.

tunnel.title: Kinetic tunnel of the craft
tunnel.summary: A corridor toward the Holive center. Many enter out of curiosity; few cross with method. The tunnel is not escape: it is focus.
tunnel.refran: The narrow path clarifies the destination. / El camino estrecho aclara el destino.

HoliGame.title: Holi Run
HoliGame.subtitle: Tap / space to jump. Collect gold. Avoid the void.
